_comment: SOURCE OF TRUTH for the store catalogue. Edited by hand here; data/products.csv is a generated reference only (run: python3 tools/export_products_csv.py after editing). Prices here are what Stripe charges.

grabAndGo.name: Mini Garland
grabAndGo.subtitle: 1 metre
grabAndGo.description: Perfect for a small accent — a doorway, a table backdrop, or a simple pop of colour.

grabAndGo.name: Standard Garland
grabAndGo.subtitle: 2 metres
grabAndGo.description: Our most popular size. Great for a backdrop, mantelpiece, or party table.

grabAndGo.name: Statement Garland
grabAndGo.subtitle: 3 metres
grabAndGo.description: Make a real impact. Fills a full wall, archway, or entrance perfectly.

grabAndGo.name: Arch Garland
grabAndGo.subtitle: 4 metres
grabAndGo.description: Go big. A full arch or long sweeping garland that becomes the centrepiece of any event.

diyKits.name: Starter Kit
diyKits.subtitle: 1 metre
diyKits.description: First time doing DIY? This is where to start. Everything you need, plus a step-by-step guide.

diyKits.name: Party Pack
diyKits.subtitle: 2 metres
diyKits.description: Great for a birthday or celebration. Enough to fill a table or mantelpiece nicely.

diyKits.name: Mega Kit
diyKits.subtitle: 3 metres
diyKits.description: For the ambitious DIY-er. A full three metres of garland tape, balloons, and everything else.
